syncGatePolicy: after PR #225 merge, sync local main and confirm clean status before continuing with the next operation.
phasePresencePolicy: confirm Phase21-31 files exist on main after pull so the local workspace matches GitHub.
draftPrPolicy: future PRs start as Draft and stop before review or merge until manual confirmation.

postMergeSyncChecks.label: Confirm PR #225 is merged before continuing.
Confirm current workspace folder before sync work.
Pull latest origin/main after PR #225 merge.
Confirm local main is up to date and working tree is clean.
Confirm recent log includes PR #225 merge commit.

phase2131PresenceChecks.label: Confirm Phase21-31 builder exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-31 DB exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-31 summary DB exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-31 test exists on main.

nextDraftGateChecks.label: Do not move from Draft without manual confirmation.
Do not merge without local verification and manual confirmation.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not commit directly to main.
Do not force push or reset main during sync work.
Do not create or modify .bat files.
Do not create or modify .ps1 files.
Do not create or modify .cmd files.
Do not create or modify .exe files.

privateLocalRules.label: Private repository and local-first operation remain required.
No public release or external delivery is included.

operationPrinciples: Post-merge sync is performed on main after each completed PR.
The current workspace folder, clean status, and recent log must be confirmed before continuing.
Phase21-31 file presence is checked so local workspace and GitHub main stay aligned.
Draft PR, review readiness, and merge remain separate manual checkpoints.
nextRecommendedStep: Confirm PR #225 merge, pull latest main, verify clean status and Phase21-31 files, then continue only through Draft PR flow.
